import api from'./api';const CMS_API_BASE='/admin';export const cmsService={// Get all pages
async getPages(){try{const response=await api.get(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages`);return response.data;}catch(e){console.log('CMS not available, using default content');return[];}},// Get page with sections and cards
async getPageWithSections(pageId){try{const response=await api.get(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages/${pageId}`);return response.data;}catch(e){return null;}},// Get published page by slug
async getPublicPage(slug){try{const response=await api.get(`/pages/${slug}`);return response.data;}catch(e){return null;}},// Get all published pages content
async getAllPublishedContent(){try{const response=await api.get(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages`);return response.data.filter(p=>p.isPublished);}catch(e){return[];}},// Admin: Create page
async createPage(data){const response=await api.post(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages`,data);return response.data;},// Admin: Update page
async updatePage(id,data){const response=await api.put(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages/${id}`,data);return response.data;},// Admin: Delete page
async deletePage(id){const response=await api.delete(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages/${id}`);return response.data;},// Admin: Create section
async createSection(pageId,data){const response=await api.post(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages/${pageId}/sections`,data);return response.data;},// Admin: Update section
async updateSection(id,data){const response=await api.put(`${CMS_API_BASE}/sections/${id}`,data);return response.data;},// Admin: Delete section
async deleteSection(id){const response=await api.delete(`${CMS_API_BASE}/sections/${id}`);return response.data;},// Admin: Create card
async createCard(sectionId,data){const response=await api.post(`${CMS_API_BASE}/sections/${sectionId}/cards`,data);return response.data;},// Admin: Update card
async updateCard(id,data){const response=await api.put(`${CMS_API_BASE}/cards/${id}`,data);return response.data;},// Admin: Delete card
async deleteCard(id){const response=await api.delete(`${CMS_API_BASE}/cards/${id}`);return response.data;}};export const contentService={// ========== SERVICES ==========
async getServices(){try{const response=await api.get('/services');return response.data;}catch(e){return null;}},async getAdminServices(){try{const response=await api.get('/admin/services');return response.data;}catch(e){return[];}},async createService(data){const response=await api.post('/admin/services',data);return response.data;},async updateService(id,data){const response=await api.put(`/admin/services/${id}`,data);return response.data;},async deleteService(id){const response=await api.delete(`/admin/services/${id}`);return response.data;},// ========== FAQS ==========
async getFaqs(){try{const response=await api.get('/faqs');return response.data;}catch(e){return null;}},async getAdminFaqs(){try{const response=await api.get('/admin/faqs');return response.data;}catch(e){return[];}},async createFaq(data){const response=await api.post('/admin/faqs',data);return response.data;},async updateFaq(id,data){const response=await api.put(`/admin/faqs/${id}`,data);return response.data;},async deleteFaq(id){const response=await api.delete(`/admin/faqs/${id}`);return response.data;},// ========== OFFERS ==========
async getOffers(){try{const response=await api.get('/offers');return response.data;}catch(e){return null;}},async getAdminOffers(){try{const response=await api.get('/admin/offers');return response.data;}catch(e){return[];}},async createOffer(data){const response=await api.post('/admin/offers',data);return response.data;},async updateOffer(id,data){const response=await api.put(`/admin/offers/${id}`,data);return response.data;},async deleteOffer(id){const response=await api.delete(`/admin/offers/${id}`);return response.data;},// ========== TESTIMONIALS ==========
async getTestimonials(){try{const response=await api.get('/testimonials');return response.data;}catch(e){return null;}},async getAdminTestimonials(){try{const response=await api.get('/admin/testimonials');return response.data;}catch(e){return[];}},async createTestimonial(data){const response=await api.post('/admin/testimonials',data);return response.data;},async updateTestimonial(id,data){const response=await api.put(`/admin/testimonials/${id}`,data);return response.data;},async deleteTestimonial(id){const response=await api.delete(`/admin/testimonials/${id}`);return response.data;}};export default cmsService;
